message:
feat(tui,events): human overlay events with duration tracking and dashboard telemetry

Add attention-aware human overlay event types and wire them into the
dashboard popup system so the robot operator can observe user focus
patterns (zoom, overlay dismiss) with timing data.

Events layer (internal/events/bus.go):
- Add EventHumanZoom and EventHumanOverlayDismiss event type constants
- Add HumanZoomEvent and HumanOverlayDismissEvent struct types with
  constructors carrying cursor position and duration metadata
- EnableRobotMode now silently ignores encode errors on closed writers
  instead of surfacing them

Dashboard (internal/tui/dashboard/dashboard.go):
- Popup overlay now tracks overlayOpenedAt timestamp
- Extract activatePopupMode(), exitPopupOverlay(), handlePaneZoom()
  as named methods, consolidating duplicated zoom/escape code paths
- Zoom and escape in popup mode publish human.zoom / human.overlay_dismiss
  events via the bus, including cursor position and overlay duration
- Introduce test-friendly dependency injection vars: dashboardNow,
  dashboardZoomPane, dashboardDisplayMessage, dashboardPublishBusEvent

Tests:
- bus_test.go: Tests for human overlay event types and negative duration
  clamping
- dashboard_popup_test.go: 365 new lines covering overlay zoom hint
  with/without cursor, activate popup sets timestamp, zoom publishes
  event with cursor hint, escape publishes dismiss with duration,
  attention feed normalization checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
